{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/67026153?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/amine123ait", "id": 67026153, "login": "amine123ait", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY3MDI2MTUz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/amine123ait", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-33728", "cvss": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 9.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "In versions of dd-trace-java prior to 1.60.3, the RMI instrumentation registered a custom endpoint that deserialized incoming data without applying serialization filters. On JDK version 16 and earlier, an attacker with network access to a JMX or RMI port on an instrumented JVM could exploit this to potentially achieve remote code execution. All three of the following conditions must be true to exploit this vulnerability:
1. dd-trace-java is attached as a Java agent (`-javaagent`) on Java 16 or earlier
2. A JMX/RMI port has been explicitly configured via `-Dcom.sun.management.jmxremote.port` and is network-reachable
3. A gadget-chain-compatible library is present on the classpath

### Impact
Arbitrary remote code execution with the privileges of the user running the instrumented JVM.

### Recommendation
- For JDK >= 17: No action is required, but upgrading is strongly encouraged.
- For JDK >= 8u121 < JDK 17: Upgrade to dd-trace-java version 1.60.3 or later.
- For JDK < 8u121 and earlier where serialization filters are not available, apply the workaround described below.

### Workarounds
Set the following environment variable to disable the RMI integration: `DD_INTEGRATION_RMI_ENABLED=false`

### Credits
This vulnerability was responsibly disclosed by Mohamed Amine ait Ouchebou (mrecho) (Indiesecurity) via the Datadog bug bounty program.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00622, "percentile": 0.45501}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-579q-h82j-r5v2", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-26T16:45:41Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-579q-h82j-r5v2", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-579q-h82j-r5v2"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-33728"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-03-27T01:16:20Z", "published_at": "2026-03-26T16:45:41Z", "references": ["https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-java/security/advisories/GHSA-579q-h82j-r5v2", "https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-java/releases/tag/v1.60.3", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-33728", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-579q-h82j-r5v2"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/DataDog/dd-trace-java/security-advisories/GHSA-579q-h82j-r5v2", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-java", "summary": "dd-trace-java: Unsafe deserialization in RMI instrumentation may lead to remote code execution", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-09T11:52:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-579q-h82j-r5v2", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.60.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "com.datadoghq:dd-java-agent"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 0.40.0, < 1.60.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: dd-trace-java: Unsafe deserialization in RMI instrumentation may lead to remote code execution
